notes:
Ember 1.7.1 — macOS shortcut fix

• Keyboard shortcuts like ⌘W, ⌘C and ⌘V now fire correctly on macOS. They used to be split into 'command' then the key as two separate presses (so the shortcut never triggered); Ember now sends the whole chord at once.

Includes 1.7.0's push-to-talk voice (hold a key to talk, offline Whisper), 1.6.0's smarter local Ollama + chat-title picker + phone quick-actions, and the Norton-style Security Dashboard.
